description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND the user selects a VOD to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Fast Forward
AND presses the "select" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Fast Forward stopped
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
